stem: For the function f(x) = 7x - 4, the graph of y = f(x) in the xy-plane is parallel to line k. What is the slope of line k?
rationale: The graph of f(x) = 7x - 4 is a line with slope 7 (the coefficient of x in y = mx + b form). Parallel lines share the same slope, so the slope of line k is also 7.
